title: German beers
summary: A quick tour of German beer styles, from Munich lagers to regional specialties.
note: Drafted for beer enthusiasts who want practical style cues.

cards.title: Start familiar
cards.body: Begin with the styles most visitors meet first in Bavaria and beyond.

cards.title: Compare styles
cards.body: Look at lager, wheat, dark, strong, and regional specialty beers.

cards.title: Use cues
cards.body: Remember each style through color, aroma, body, and finish.
